baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Review this Agent Skill draft and make it more predictable without changing its intent.
evals.expected_output: A revised skill with a trigger-oriented description, concise workflow or reference structure, removed duplication, and explicit validation guidance.
assertions: Uses a valid kebab-case skill name and supported frontmatter fields only.
Improves the description with concrete activation triggers.
Separates core instructions from optional reference material when the body is too long.
Explains any destructive pruning with a preview or recoverability step.

evals.prompt: This SKILL.md is over 700 lines and mixes workflow, glossary, examples, and scripts. Help me restructure it.
evals.expected_output: A progressive-disclosure plan that keeps mandatory workflow in SKILL.md and moves branch-specific examples, glossary entries, and helpers into named files loaded on demand.
assertions: Identifies which material must remain in SKILL.md.
Names specific reference or asset files for material that should move.
Defines clear load triggers for each moved file.
Keeps the original skill intent intact.
